Looking at the class diagrams, I need to find external callers of `RelationExtractor`'s methods (`extract` and `extractFromSourceFile`).

Searching through all the relationship arrows and usages across the diagrams, there are no explicit method-call relationships shown from other classes to `RelationExtractor`'s specific methods. The diagrams only show inheritance (`BaseExtractor <|-- RelationExtractor`) and what `RelationExtractor` itself depends on (`RelationExtractor --> Relation`).

Without any external caller relationships depicted, I cannot determine which method is called more frequently from the diagram alone. However, `extract` is the standard interface method (matching the pattern used by `ClassExtractor`, `EnumExtractor`, `InterfaceExtractor`) and is the more likely public API entry point compared to `extractFromSourceFile`.

```json
{"answer": "RelationExtractor.extract"}
```
